record.field: Academic Staff: Faculty and Program Access for KRS

['|', '|', ('program_id', 'in', user.employee_id.academic_program_ids.ids), ('program_id.faculty_id', 'in', user.employee_id.academic_faculty_ids.ids), (1, '=', 1 if not user.employee_id.academic_program_ids and not user.employee_id.academic_faculty_ids else 0)]
Academic Staff: Faculty and Program Access for KHS

['|', '|', ('student_id.program_id', 'in', user.employee_id.academic_program_ids.ids), ('student_id.program_id.faculty_id', 'in', user.employee_id.academic_faculty_ids.ids), (1, '=', 1 if not user.employee_id.academic_program_ids and not user.employee_id.academic_faculty_ids else 0)]
